title: crotalaria khasiana
intro: Crotalaria khasiana is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria khasiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
